name: Sausage-Centered Hamburger Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the apple but do not peel it.
2. Use 1 8-oz package of brown and serve sausage links.
3. Mix the meat, apple, onion, egg, and seasonings together.
4. Divide the mixture into 10 equal parts.
5. Mold each part around a sausage link, sealing the ends.
6. Brown the meat rolls in a large skillet over medium heat.
7. Remove the meat rolls from the skillet.
8. Pour all but 2 tablespoons of the fat from the skillet.
9. Stir the flour into the remaining fat.
10. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thick and bubbly.
11. Stir in the bouillon and water.
12. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly, then reduce the heat.
13. Return the meat rolls to the skillet; cover and simmer for about 15 minutes.
14. Buttered noodles are a good "go-with" for this zesty dish.
